decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, Teetotal Captain / Mary Celeste) was stale SCHEDULED in state for 2026-06-15T12:00 but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200, title+author=Voidline match). Scheduled Short auto-published on 06-15; YouTube does not write back to state. Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Catalogue now 10/10 Shorts PUBLIC, 0 SCHEDULED.

Not a publish day (Thu 06-18). Pipeline 100% DRY: every Short published, nothing scheduled past 06-15. Next 3 days: Fri 06-19 (Short slot) EMPTY, Sat 06-20 EMPTY, Sun 06-21 (long-form anchor + Short slot) EMPTY. The Sunday 06-21 weekly long-form is only 3 days out with nothing staged. v4 Roanoke long-form (planned ~20 juin) is STILL blocked on the Google Flow Nano Banana 2 thumbnail-generation blocker open since 06-13 (5 days, submit button stays disabled / UI redesign). Cadence will break this week unless v4 is unblocked+rendered+scheduled, or a fallback (v3 Tunguska AI base as placeholder thumb per LEARNINGS) is used to ship on time. ACTION NEEDED before Sun 06-21.
